"'''The Employment Test'''" is a short story written by [[Michael Stern]], originally published in ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]'' and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. It was also included in ''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''.

==Plot summary==
In order to hire [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] Guards, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] must pass their test, trial by combat. He tricks them into blindfolding themselves, and the nine survivors pledge their loyalty to him.
